message:
test: update integration tests for TryStreamError type and Budget priority semantics

algebraic_laws.rs: rename budget_priority_is_min to
budget_priority_is_max, update assertion from p1.min(p2) to
p1.max(p2) to match corrected Budget::combine semantics where higher
priority values represent higher urgency.

fs_verification.rs: update buf_reader_lines test to handle
TryStreamError wrapper — map TryStreamError::Inner to io::Error and
TryStreamError::PolledAfterCompletion to a descriptive io::Error.

stream_e2e.rs: update try_collect and try_for_each error assertions
to match on TryStreamError::Inner("error") instead of bare "error".

stream_sink_integration.rs: update try_collect and try_for_each
pipeline tests to match on TryStreamError::Inner variant.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
